spec_match.rationale: Fakes the entire iframe and responsive sizing behavior using styled divs and manual JS height manipulation instead of running a real iframe and native browser sizing.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive buttons and dynamic height changes, but they operate on a mocked div representation instead of a real API surface.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The text correctly explains what it's trying to compare.

edge_cases.rationale: No real iframe loading, cross-origin boundary, or browser support detection is performed.

design_system.rationale: Fits visually with the design system.

openQuestions.title: Re-implement the postMessage comparison using real iframes and a Deno route
openQuestions.detail: The concept page currently fakes the entire iframe behavior using styled divs and manual JS height styling. It should be refactored to spawn two real iframes: one using the legacy postMessage workflow, and one using the native declarative allow-responsive-sizing attribute (requires configuring server.ts to send Supports-Responsive-Sizing: 1 for the child document).
